Listed in metadata task.json but NOT checked by verification system. export_result.sh only checks for absence of 'Rue de l'Ancienne Poste', not for '69000 Lyon'. verifier.py line 83-87 checks content_removed_old flag which only correlates to 'Rue de l'Ancienne Poste' check

privileged_info_summary: The task modifies a synthetic HTML prescription header template (Header_Standard.html) in MedinTux medical management software running under Wine. New address strings are: '50 Avenue de la Nouvelle Santé', '75000 Paris', '01 23 45 67 89'. Old address to remove includes: '12 Rue de l'Ancienne Poste'. Both 'Cabinet Médical DrTux' locations (Lyon and Paris) are fictional addresses without real-world matches in French medical practice directories. The verification system checks for: file modification timestamp, presence of all three new address strings, and removal of 'Rue de l'Ancienne Poste' substring. The metadata lists '69000 Lyon' as forbidden but the verification system does not enforce removal of this postal code.
